revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-3-285

Of an oscillation (not necessarily sinusoidal), the rate of change of phase, expressed in radians per second, divided by 2n.

Reference: I.E.C.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Instantaneous frequency}}
